data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy& up 3.11%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy up 3.11%, BitMine up 3.56%, Coinbase up 0.91%, Sharplink Gaming up 2.4%, and DeFi Development Corp up 4.69%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: How AI and Tokenized Dollars Will Anchor the 2026 Global Economy
data.description:
Analysts see AI data centers and energy-backed computing power as strategic infrastructure in 2026, similar to how oil reserves are managed.
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/how-ai-and-tokenized-dollars-will-anchor-the-2026-global-economy/

data.title: Gate's derivatives market share is projected to see the largest increase in 2025, while its spot market share growth rate remained among the top three in December.
data.description: CoinDesk's latest monthly report for December shows that Gate's market share in derivatives rose to 11% that month, making it the centralized trading platform with the largest increase in derivatives market share in December. Looking at the whole year, Gate's cumulative increase in derivatives market share was 9.32%, ranking first among centralized trading platforms, with an increase more than double that of the second-ranked platform. Furthermore, in the spot market, Gate's market share growth in December remained firmly in third place. With its dual-pronged approach in both derivatives and spot markets, Gate is becoming a significant force driving changes in the industry's market structure. At the business and brand levels, Gate is simultaneously advancing several important developments. The Gate App has been revamped, with the homepage showcasing an international promotional video in collaboration with the F1 Red Bull Racing team for the first time; Gate Pay has officially launched its institutional account function, providing merchants and institutional users with a one-stop, multi-tiered account management solution. At the same time, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han was named one of Entrepreneur Middle East's "The 100" 2025 list; at the inaugural BeInCrypto 100 Awards, Gate won both "Best Centralized Exchange" and "Best Brand of the Year", while Gate Ventures won Best VC of the Year.

data.title: OKX Boost leaderboard rules have been upgraded; the top three tokens in the rankings will be added to the listing watchlist.
data.description: OKX Wallet announced that it will officially upgrade its Boost ranking rules on January 14, 2026 at 11:00 (UTC+8). The new rules introduce an on-chain token score evaluation system. Tokens consistently ranking in the top three will be placed on OKX exchange's listing watchlist for faster review; lower-ranking tokens may be removed from the ranking and have their trading volume bonus cancelled. Simultaneously, the top three tokens in the daily ranking will receive an additional 50% Boost trading volume bonus. Furthermore, Meme tokens that meet criteria such as market capitalization, liquidity, and community activity will also have the opportunity to be included in the Boost ranking and will be subject to the same rules.

data.title: Rising Concerns Over Crypto-Related Attacks in France
data.description: According to PANews, a crypto investment executive and his family in Verneuil-sur-Seine, France, were attacked by three armed intruders last Friday night. The family was assaulted and tied up with zip ties. The day before, another investor was kidnapped, beaten, and abandoned 50 kilometers from his home near Cholet. These incidents are part of a growing trend of '$5 wrench attacks' in France, where criminals use violence to force victims to surrender their crypto assets. This has sparked widespread concern over data breaches and security risks.

data.title: Crypto Media's Shifting: Your Guide to Get Reliable Crypto News After Google’s 2025 Updates
data.description: Key TakeawaysGoogle’s 2025 algorithm updates have reshaped crypto news discovery and trustCrypto media now fragments by intent: data, policy, DeFi, tradingBinance News aggregates trusted sources into a single market-focused feed In late 2025, parts of the crypto media landscape quietly but materially changed. Following Google algorithm updates, several long-standing crypto news sites experienced sharp declines in organic search visibility. Industry analysts have linked the drop to Google’s stricter enforcement of its “Site Reputation Abuse” policy—a framework designed to penalize websites that host low-quality, unrelated, or reputation-piggybacking content—particularly in high-risk sectors like finance and crypto.One widely discussed case was Cointelegraph, which saw a dramatic reduction in search traffic and, according to SEO professionals, temporarily struggled to rank even for branded queries. While the outlet continued publishing as usual, discovery via search became significantly harder.This episode has highlighted and accelerated a shift already underway: users are actively looking for new, trustworthy places to get signal without noise.Below is a practical guide to navigating that shift. Why Google’s “Site Reputation Abuse” Policy Matters for Crypto ReadersGoogle’s 2025 enforcement wave focused on a simple idea: well-known domains should not rent out their trust to unrelated or low-quality content.In crypto, this often shows up as:News sites hosting betting, casino, or coupon subfoldersSudden explosions of SEO-driven listicles unrelated to crypto fundamentalsThin “news rewrites” optimized for clicks rather than insightFor readers, the takeaway is about filtering for credibility in an environment where discovery via search is no longer guaranteed. What Do You Want From Your Crypto News? Match the Source to Your IntentNot all crypto readers want the same thing. Some want data. Some want policy context. Some want DeFi narratives. Some want actionable market signals.Here’s how leading crypto media outlets tend to specialize:By Reader IntentThe Block: Market data, institutional flowsCoindesk: Policy, regulation, and macroeconomic contextBinance News: Market signals and aggregated newsDecrypt: Developer and protocol updatesNo single outlet does everything perfectly, but some are better positioned than others in a fragmented discovery environment. Signal vs. Noise: A Comparative ViewOutletPrimary StrengthSignal-to-Noise RatioBest ForThe BlockProprietary data, institutional reportingHigh signalFunds, analysts, serious market researchCoinDeskPolicy, regulation, macro framingHigh signalUnderstanding governments & institutionsBinance NewsAggregated signals + market contextHigh signalTraders, active users, all-in-one feedDecryptClear explainers, product coverageAverage signalNew protocols, ecosystem updatesBanklessDeFi narratives, long-form opinionsAverage signalDeFi-native users, thought leadershipLegacy SEO-heavy sitesHigh volume, mixed qualityHigh noise Casual browsing (with caution)This ranking is based on editorial focus, consistency, and relevance for high-intent crypto readers, rather than traffic volume. Why You Should Read Binance NewsBinance News functions as an in-app news ecosystem, pulling in curated feeds from other news outlets, alongside original market updates and data-driven insights.For users, the advantage is structural:No reliance on Google search rankingsOne feed combining prices, breaking news, and analysisDirect context next to markets and trading toolsIf you are a retail trader in need of a “Bloomberg Terminal”, Binance News centralizes signal where decisions are actually made. How to Spot a “Compromised” or Low-Trust Crypto SiteIf you’re evaluating a new source, here are simple red flags to watch for:Odd SubfoldersURLs like /betting/, /casino/, /promo/, or /coupons/ on a news siteUnrelated Sponsored ContentGambling, payday loans, or generic finance offers embedded in “news”Volume Over InsightDozens of shallow articles per day with no original sourcingNo Clear Editorial IdentityHard to tell who the audience is, or why an article exists The Bottom LineCrypto media is not disappearing, rather, it is re-sorting.As Google tightens trust requirements and search becomes less reliable as a discovery layer, readers are gravitating toward:Fewer, more intentional sourcesAggregated ecosystems over single outletsClear alignment between intent and contentFor high-intent readers looking for a new home, the winning strategy is not chasing rankings—it is choosing signal, structure, and context—and this is where the next phase of crypto media is heading.

data.title: Polygon's Transaction Fees Surge Amid New Market Features
data.description: According to PANews, Polygon has generated over $1.7 million in transaction fees and burned more than 12.5 million POL tokens since early 2026. The increase in fees is largely attributed to Polymarket's introduction of a fee feature for its 15-minute prediction market, which brought in over $100,000 in revenue for Polygon in a single day. Following the launch of the Dandeli hard fork, the chain's throughput increased to 20 mgas/s, effectively alleviating gas pressure.

data.title: Bitget 2025 Annual Report: UEX Strategy Integrates Core Sectors such as On-Chain, US Stocks, TradeFi, and AI
data.description: Bitget released its 2025 Annual Review Report, systematically summarizing the milestones of its Unlimited Exchange (UEX) model in the fields of crypto assets, on-chain markets, and tokenized traditional financial assets. The report shows that institutional participation on the platform continued to increase, with institutional clients' spot trading volume rising from 39.4% at the beginning of the year to 82% at the end; in the futures market, institutional trading volume accounted for 60% during the same period. According to CoinGlass's "2025 Crypto Derivatives Market Annual Report," Bitget ranked fourth globally in derivatives trading volume, with a total trading volume of $8.17 trillion for the year. Regarding product matrix expansion, Bitget continued to improve the Unlimited Exchange (UEX) ecosystem through the integration of multi-dimensional assets. The Onchain trading section, launched in April 2025, had accumulated a trading volume of over $2.4 billion by the end of the year. Since its launch in September, the US stock futures section has seen over 1 million users participate in related trading on the Bitget platform, with a cumulative trading volume exceeding $15 billion. With the full opening of the TradFi platform, its daily trading volume reached $2 billion in a short period, supporting users to trade various assets such as forex, precious metals, indices, and commodities using USDT. The report also mentioned the performance of AI applications, with GetAgent surpassing 500,000 users in 2025 and generating 2 million interactions related to portfolio and strategy decisions throughout the year. Bitget's CEO stated that the achievements in 2025 demonstrate the potential unleashed by a unified platform integrating diverse global markets. Looking ahead to 2026, Bitget will focus on three strategic directions: UEX, AI, and compliance.

data.title: 21Shares Launches Bitcoin–Gold ETP on London Stock Exchange
data.description:
On January 13, 2026, 21Shares officially launched its Bitcoin and Gold ETP (ticker: BOLD) on the London Stock Exchange, marking a first for the UK market. BOLD is the first UK-listed exchange-traded product to combine physically backed bitcoin and gold exposure in a single vehicle, offering investors a hybrid approach to growth and stability.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/21shares-launches-bitcoin-gold-etp-on-london-stock-exchange/

data.title: Matrixport: Gold has outperformed Bitcoin by approximately 80% over the past year.
data.description: Matrixport released a chart today stating that gold prices continued their strong performance, effectively breaking through the previous resistance zone. Back in the summer of 2023, when gold prices approached the $2,000 mark, we pointed out that breakout momentum was accumulating near key price levels, and the medium-term upward window was worth watching closely. With Trump and the US Department of Justice serving a grand jury subpoena to Federal Reserve Chairman Powell, market concerns about the Fed's independence have further intensified. Damaged institutional credibility continues to provide structural support for gold and may accelerate central banks' efforts to reduce their reliance on the dollar and diversify their foreign exchange reserves. In a horizontal comparison, gold has outperformed Bitcoin by approximately 80% over the past year. Current momentum remains strong, the trend structure is still bullish, and trend-following strategies remain advantageous.

data.title: XMR Experiences Significant Price Surge and Increased Contract Holdings
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that XMR has seen a notable increase of 51.6% over the past week, reaching new all-time highs. This surge in price has been accompanied by a rise in the total contract holdings across the network. As of the time of reporting, XMR contract holdings have reached 417,500, marking a 69.3% increase over four days.

Additionally, in the past 24 hours, XMR experienced liquidations amounting to $3.2264 million across the network.
